title: 'Uncover what's really going on': UFO researcher in Manitoba supports AI tracking
description: Artificial intelligence is going to make it easier to spot whether a bird, a plane or an otherworldly creature is in the sky, as Canadians continue to report sightings of unidentified flying objects, says Canada's top UFO expert.
